title: howardia glaucescens
intro: Howardia glaucescens, also known as Desert Marigold, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Howardia glaucescens include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the Desert Marigold can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
